options.text: Who won the most recent Super Bowl?
Can you tell me who won the Super Bowl this year and what the final score was?
When does your training data end? Based on what you do know, what can you tell me about recent Super Bowl winners — and what should I verify with a current source?

responses.response_weak: The Kansas City Chiefs won Super Bowl LVIII in February 2024, defeating the San Francisco 49ers 25-22 in overtime.
responses.response_medium: The Kansas City Chiefs won Super Bowl LVIII in 2024, beating the San Francisco 49ers with a final score of 25-22. The game went into overtime and was played at Allegiant Stadium in Las Vegas.
responses.response_strong: My training data has a knowledge cutoff, so I may not have information about the most recent Super Bowl depending on when you're asking. Based on what I know, here are recent Super Bowl winners: Kansas City Chiefs won LVIII (2024) and LVII (2023), the Los Angeles Rams won LVI (2022), and Tampa Bay won LV (2021). However, since my information may be outdated, I'd recommend checking current sports news sources like ESPN, NFL.com, or major news outlets to confirm the most recent winner and get up-to-date details about the game, score, and any recent developments.

feedback.what_happened: The weak and medium prompts both assume the AI has current information, so they get confident-sounding answers that might be outdated or wrong. The AI responds as if it knows for certain, giving specific details without any caveats. The effective prompt acknowledges the AI's limitations upfront, which completely changes the response — instead of potentially wrong 'facts,' you get honest context about what the AI does and doesn't know, plus guidance on where to find reliable current information.
feedback.principle: Know what AI can't do — AI systems have knowledge cutoffs and can't browse the internet for current information, so asking about recent events without acknowledging this leads to potentially outdated answers presented as fact.
feedback.tip: When asking about recent events, stock prices, or breaking news, start by asking 'When does your training data end?' or say 'Based on what you know...' — this prompts the AI to be transparent about its limitations and guide you to current sources.
